# nat-tag



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Premium Tag component

## Properties

| Property   | Attribute  | Description                   | Type                                                           | Default     |
| ---------- | ---------- | ----------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `closable` | `closable` | Whether the tag can be closed | `boolean`                                                      | `false`     |
| `shape`    | `shape`    | Shape of the tag              | `"pill" \| "round"`                                            | `'round'`   |
| `variant`  | `variant`  | The visual variant of the tag | `"danger" \| "neutral" \| "primary" \| "success" \| "warning"` | `'neutral'` |


## Events

| Event      | Description                              | Type                |
| ---------- | ---------------------------------------- | ------------------- |
| `natClose` | Emitted when the close button is clicked | `CustomEvent<void>` |
